allow: Bash(sed -i "s/'HelveticaLTPro-Bold', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif/\\"helvetica-lt-pro\\", 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif/g" src/components/GalleryModal.tsx src/components/ProductModal.tsx src/components/SiteFooter.tsx src/pages/AboutUs.tsx src/pages/Home.tsx src/pages/OurWork.tsx src/pages/Products.tsx)

Bash(sed -i "s/'HelveticaLTPro-Bold', 'Arial Black', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif/\\"helvetica-lt-pro\\", 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif/g" src/components/GalleryModal.tsx src/components/ProductModal.tsx src/components/SiteFooter.tsx src/pages/AboutUs.tsx src/pages/Home.tsx src/pages/OurWork.tsx src/pages/Products.tsx)
